summary: Tested boot sequence fix: sequential line typing, inline cursor, input bar states, and hot chips behavior during and after boot. All features working correctly.

test_results.sequential_boot_lines: PASS - Lines appear one at a time. At ~300ms after networkidle: Line 1 complete + Line 2 mid-type. At ~900ms: 3 lines. At final: all 4 lines.
test_results.inline_cursor_on_current_line: PASS - animate-blink cursor visible on the actively typing boot line only (showCursor prop correctly tied to currentBootLine === item.lineIdx)
test_results.cursor_moves_between_lines: PASS - cursor transitions from Line 1 to Line 2 as each line starts
test_results.input_prompt_dimmed_during_boot: PASS - prompt color rgb(68,68,68) during boot, rgb(127,122,255) after boot
test_results.input_cursor_dark_during_boot: PASS - terminal-cursor backgroundColor rgb(51,51,51) during boot, rgb(127,122,255) after boot
test_results.hot_chips_disabled_during_boot: PASS - code confirms opacity:0.35, cursor:not-allowed when !bootDone; disabled attribute set on button
test_results.hot_chips_enabled_after_boot: PASS - chip-whoami shows opacity:1, cursor:pointer after bootDone
test_results.help_command_after_boot: PASS - typing help + Enter returns 'Available commands: [whoami, status, log, clear]'
test_results.whoami_chip_after_boot: PASS - clicking whoami chip fires command and returns 'Anushka Karmakar | Product Marketing Manager | Deep Tech & DevTools'

context_for_next_testing_agent: Boot sequence fully working. Sequential typewriter with inline cursor, dimmed input during boot, hot chips disabled during boot. All 4 lines appear in order. Post-boot: input/chips activate with purple styling.
